name: intellectual_property_sensor_fusion_harbor_rig_utl
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Intellectual Property, the situation tagged internally around intellectual property sensor fusion harbor rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Amina Serrano
agents.identity: I am Amina Serrano, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Intellectual Property. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Mira Ishikawa, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Intellectual Property. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so utility does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so rights does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Amina Serrano must choose under rights versus utility. What does Amina Serrano do?
